title: 葵Sの後に・カワイイの予感

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan runs well in the Aoi Stakes, and her
cuteness is praised across social media. As such,
she's in a good mood.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home, we run into Eishin Flash, who
debuted around the same time as Curren Chan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash is doing some last-minute
preparations before the Japanese Derby
tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Impressed by Eishin Flash's spirit, Curren Chan
asks to go watch the Japanese Derby.
